reviews.review_description: Add an ai or something the lack of people is absurd
Did not get very far in this game. After selecting avatar the next screen to pick the play  room is frozen. Unable to move forward to actually play!

developer_response.body:
hey Kerswell, 
we havent met this problem before. did you try to shoot the screen with a snowball?

if a restart (game and headset) does not help, pls join our discord and find [SBVR Dani]. we try to solve the problem. 

https://discord.gg/KdDSZAJkrk

reviews.review_description: Nice GFX, lots of fun. Not the biggest game, but it is very funny. And you get sweaty while playing ;-) Nice work again. Its from the developers of the most realistic Pool game in VR, Black Hole Pool

reviews.review_title: best multiplayer snowball fight in VR
reviews.review_description: you can play public and private game. blue team versus red team. snowball fight with loots

reviews.review_title: Does what is says on the tin!
reviews.review_description: Fun little snowballing multiplayer game from the talented devs that brought us Black Hole Pool.

reviews.review_title: Great game to play for the holidays.
reviews.review_description: Fun game to play with friends.

reviews.review_title: None on public rooms, even an artificial
reviews.review_description:
You cold add an artificial character on the public room so if no one is thereat least you could try the game.
Also you could make at least one house with an open door and a place to sit and watch the snow falling. This could improve the game greatly. I got in on different hours 3 times, no one in public room. A pitty .
Really fun to play with friends and so entertaining its hard to stop
I really like this game. It's quick, fun and still has some room for tactics.
It has proximity chat and has lots of tactics but it needs more maps but overall it’s amazing.
